question: Write a function in C++ that takes two integers as input and swaps their values using pass-by-reference. Signature: void swapIntegers(int& a, int& b);

test_cases.expected:
Before swap: x = 10, y = 20
After swap: x = 20, y = 10

errors: Function uses pass-by-value instead of pass-by-reference
Values won't be swapped in main function because parameters are copied, not referenced
